    C

    Customer - Class in model
    represents a customer in the arcade system.
    Customer() - Constructor for class model.Customer
     
    Customer(int, String, String, int) - Constructor for class model.Customer
     
    CustomerDAO - Class in dao
    Data Access Object (DAO) for the Customer table.
    CustomerDAO() - Constructor for class dao.CustomerDAO
     
    CustomerGUI - Class in gui
     
    CustomerGUI() - Constructor for class gui.CustomerGUI
    Constructor for the CustomerGUI Initializes the main window and registers all application screens and sets the application to full-screen mode.
